concerns.text: FR-006 mandates capturing and processing 'actual VR interaction data' (response times, gaze, judgments). The tasks (T013-T018) only implement generation of *simulated* logs. There is no task to implement the ingestion pipeline for 'actual' data or the VR client interface required to capture it, leaving the FR unimplementable in its current scope.

FR-001 requires ingesting real datasets from OSF (MFQ) and HuggingFace (Moral Stories). Tasks T013-T015 only implement synthetic data generation and ingestion of simulated data. No task exists to implement the fetch/ingest logic for the real OSF/HuggingFace sources required by the spec.

SC-002 requires measuring model improvement against a baseline using a ΔAIC > 10 threshold. While T023 calculates AIC/WAIC, there is no specific task to implement the logic that explicitly checks/reporting if ΔAIC > 10 and flags 'strong evidence' as required by the success criterion.

Task T030 description lists the sensitivity analysis threshold set as '{, 10, 20}', missing the value '2' which is required by FR-005 and SC-004. This typo risks an incomplete implementation of the sensitivity analysis.

The spec assumes the Unity VR scene is 'downloadable and runnable' on the runner. The plan defers this to a future phase, and no task exists to implement the Unity scene integration, download logic, or the verification of the simulation's fidelity to the actual Unity environment.
